name: Neuschwanstein & Linderhof Castle Day Trip from Munich
tagline: Two of Bavaria's most spectacular royal castles in a single unforgettable day
overview: Leave the Bavarian capital behind and spend the day among Ludwig II's fairy-tale creations. Visit Neuschwanstein — the castle that inspired Disney's Cinderella — perched high above the Hohenschwangau valley, then continue to the intimate Linderhof Palace, the only one of Ludwig's projects he lived to see completed.
highlights: Guided tour of Linderhof Palace and its formal gardens
Expert guide narrating the life of King Ludwig II
Views over the Alpsee lake and Alpine foothills

itinerary.description: Explore the iconic fairy-tale castle commissioned by Ludwig II. Guided interior tour of the Throne Room, Singer's Hall, and royal apartments. Panoramic views from Marienbrücke bridge.
Tour the only Bavarian royal residence Ludwig II completed. Admire the rococo interiors and the spectacular water-jet fountain in the formal French gardens.

meeting_point: Munich city centre — exact location confirmed at booking
tips: Wear comfortable walking shoes — the path to Neuschwanstein involves a 30-minute uphill walk
Bring layers: temperatures at castle level are cooler than in Munich
Book at least a week ahead in summer — this is one of GYG's most popular tours globally

faqs.question: Is the tour suitable for children?
faqs.answer: Yes, children are welcome. Note the uphill walk to Neuschwanstein takes about 30 minutes on a paved path.

faqs.question: What happens if it rains?
faqs.answer: The tour runs in all weather. Both castles are primarily indoor experiences. Bring a light waterproof jacket.

hero_image.alt: Neuschwanstein Castle rising above autumn forest in Bavaria

meta.title: Neuschwanstein & Linderhof Day Trip from Munich
meta.description: Book the best Neuschwanstein and Linderhof castle day trip from Munich. Skip-the-line access, expert guide, round-trip transport. From €65 per person.
